title: staelia aurea
intro: Staelia aurea, also known as the golden rod tree, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Staelia aurea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various infections. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, with some herbal preparations also using the plant's leaves and bark for medicinal purposes.
